title: LLOYTRON Active Indoor Panel TV Antenna Aerial with Digital Freeview Compatibility / Built-in LTE 4G Filter / Powerful Amplifier / 50dB gain / Superior Frequency Range / Adapter Included - A3103BK
features: SIMPLE TO USE: The compact and simple design makes it easy to set up and control. Once plugged in, simply connect to your television and turn the antenna in various directions until you find the position that gives you the best quality. Adjustable for vertical or horizontal signals.

POWERFUL BUILT-IN AMPLIFIER: The LLOYTRON Active Indoor Loop TV Antenna has adjustable legs to prop the square aerial up with VHF 174 - 230MHz frequency range for FM / DAB radio reception and a 3-stage variable amplifier. This powerful built-in amplifier allows you the best picture quality and clear sound reception for your TV.

MULTIPLE FEATURES: Our high performing TV antenna are Freeview HD compatible, have a built-in LTE / 4G filter to protect against smartphone interference and channel loss and can amplify signals by up to 50dB gain.
FREEVIEW COMPATIBLE: Compatible with Freeview and Freeview HD and with superior UHF 470 - 790MHz frequency radio signal range for wideband TV reception.
USEFUL: Plug into any UK mains power socket to use, this lightweight device can easily be transported from room to room for use on a variety of televisions around your home.
Superior UHF and VHF reception for TV and FM / DAB radio
description: The LLOYTRON Active Indoor Panel TV Antenna has adjustable legs to prop the square aerial up with VHF 174 - 230MHz frequency range for FM / DAB radio reception and a 3-stage variable amplifier. This powerful built-in amplifier allows you the best picture quality and clear sound reception for your TV and is compatible with Freeview and Freeview HD and offers superior UHF 470 - 790MHz frequency radio signal range for wideband TV reception. The simple design makes it easy to set up and control. Once plugged in, simply connect to your television and turn the antenna in various directions until you find the position that gives you the best quality. Adjustable for vertical or horizontal signals. Plug into any UK mains power socket to use, this lightweight device can easily be transported from room to room for use on a variety of televisions around your home. The power LED indicator will let you know when plugged in so you know when the antenna is in operation. With a built-in LTE 4G Filter to make sure other signals won't break up or interrupt your picture and with up to 50db gain, you are sure to have a clear picture and quality sound. TV antennas are ever popular; alongside use in additional rooms of the home, many people are choosing to move away from the monthly cable/satellite bills and millennials want free local channels to add to their streaming of Netflix, Now TV etc. Package includes: LLOYTRON Active Indoor Panel TV Antenna 1 x Mains adapter 1 x Instruction manual
